strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, cloud)
Strong track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators for agentic workflows)
Entrepreneurial experience (founded GISCollective) demonstrating initiative and product ownership
concerns: Lacks direct AI/ML product development experience in resume (no clear ML models, AI platforms, or research contributions)
Master's/PhD in AI-related field not mentioned (only general CS degree from MIT)
No explicit cloud architecture or leadership experience (current role is Staff Engineer, not Director-level)
response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering fundamentals and some AI-adjacent work (AI-agent infrastructure), but lacks direct AI product/platform development or cloud strategy experience required for this role. His entrepreneurial background is a plus, but the resume doesn't highlight enough AI-specific achievements to justify a director-level IC role in AI strategy.
